title:
Citation Linking Implementation - Session Summary

## Objective
Implement clickable citations for...
content: # Citation Linking Implementation - Session Summary ## Objective Implement clickable citations for folkprotocol, making [1][2][3] style references jump to the References section. ## Solution Delivered Created a **remark plugin** (`plugins/remark-citations.mjs`) that processes markdown at build time: - Citations like `[1]` → `[1]` - Reference entries get anchors: `[1]` - Handles comma-separated citations: `[1,2,3]` → each number individually clickable - Zero external dependencies (vanilla JS AST traversal) - Works with Astro static site generator ## Files Changed - `plugins/remark-citations.mjs` - Core citation processing logic - `astro.config.mjs` - Configure markdown pipeline to use plugin - `docs/citations.md` - Complete documentation for future contributors - `tickly-cough.md` - Fixed frontmatter schema compatibility ## Testing - Verified on tickly-cough.md (21 references) - Build completes successfully - Citations render as clickable links - Reference anchors properly generated - Site preview confirmed functionality ## Known Issues - Minor cosmetic: Some citations generate duplicate empty anchors (e.g., `[1]`) - Root cause: Markdown/Markdoc treating `[N]` as reference-style link attempt - Impact: None - links work correctly, empty anchors are invisible - Logged as friction-20251230-64mf and closed as non-blocking ## Merge Readiness - Confidence: 8/10 - Status: Complete and tested - Risk: Low - additive feature, doesn't affect existing content - Tender: tender-20251230-mzw9 ## Future Enhancements (from brief) Not implemented but documented in `docs/citations.md`: 1. Hover preview cards (requires client-side JS) 2. Links to `/research/studies/` pages (needs studies collection) 3. Back-references from references to citations 4. Citation validation warnings
